title: HOX Official Minecraft 600ml Water Bottle ft Alex & Steve - Lightweight Plastic Drinks Bottle + Carry Loop - Removable straw & Flip Spout | Gift for Minecraft Gamers, White/Opaque
features: BPA-Free Construction: Our BPA-free water bottle ensures safe drinks for kids, making it an ideal choice for school. Crafted with care, this bottle eliminates harmful chemicals, providing parents peace of mind while their children enjoy their favorite drinks.
HOX Leakproof Design: Designed with advanced leakproof technology, this bottle prevents spills, making it perfect for schools and outdoor activities.

Equipped with a practical straw, this water bottle allows for easy drinking without spills. Whether at school or play, kids, including boys and girls, will find it simple and enjoyable to use, adding convenience to their daily routine.
600ml Capacity: This 600ml bottle is ideal for school and daily hydration needs. It fits easily into backpacks, ensuring children have enough water throughout the day.

Perfect gifts for kids who love playing Minecraft, this is the perfect gift for minecraft lovers. This water bottle in Minecraft character design will become an instant favourite for any Minecraft games player.
description: From the manufacturer Leak Free and Fuss free Lockable top lid with one handed operation reveals the pop up soft silicone spout. Equipped with a practical straw, this water bottle allows for easy drinking without spills All Day Hydration This 600ml bottle is ideal for school and daily hydration needs. It fits easily into backpacks, ensuring children have enough water throughout the day. Alex & Steve Design Perfect gifts for kids who love playing Minecraft. This water bottle in Minecraft character design will become an instant favourite for any Minecraft games player.
